author: mmusich
body:
#### PR description:

Address the issue reported at https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51004#issuecomment-4609596473.

#### PR validation:

`runTheMatrix.py -l 34434.774 -w upgrade --nEvents 10 --ibeos -i all -t 4 -j 8` runs fine.

title: protect handles for NGT nano validation workflow
